scheme_name: Financial Assistance to Non-Pensioner World War-II Veterans and Their Widows
page_title: Financial Assistance to Non-Pensioner World War-II Veterans and Their Widows

details: The “Financial Assistance to Non-Pensioner World War-II Veterans and Their Widows” scheme was launched by the Home Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh. The scheme aims to provide financial aid to ensure a dignified livelihood for world War-II veterans who are non-pensioners and their lawful wives.
benefits: Financial assistance of ₹8,000 per month is provided to non-pensioner world War-II veterans and their lawful widows.
The financial assistance amount is directly credited to the beneficiary’s bank account through the District Sainik Welfare Office.
The financial assistance is disbursed monthly.
Disbursement is made within one week of application verification and approval.
eligibility: The applicant must be a permanent resident of Madhya Pradesh.
The applicant must be a non-pensioner World War-II veteran who served between 1 September 1939 and 14 August 1945, or his lawful widow.
The veteran must have been discharged from military service due to demobilization after the end of World War-II.
The applicant must not be receiving any pension from defense services or any other source.
In case of the veteran’s death, only the lawful widow is eligible for the benefit.
Upon the death of the widow, no other heir (children or relatives) becomes eligible.

offline: In the online registration form, fill the following mandatory fields: Email ID, Mobile Number. Create a password and confirm. Finally, click "Submit" to complete the registration.
After successful registration, the User ID and Password will be generated.
Visit the official website. Sign in using your Username and Password created during registration.
Navigate to the online form of the scheme. In the form, fill in all the mandatory fields and upload all the mandatory documents in the specified format and size.

Carefully review all the information provided and the documents uploaded. Make any necessary corrections. Click "Save Application". You'll receive a confirmation message upon successful submission of the application, along with an "application number". Click "Print Application" to print the application.

documents_required: Marriage Certificate (in case of widow applicant)
Death Certificate of Veteran (in case of widow applicant)

faqs.question: Who is eligible under this scheme?
faqs.answer: Non-pensioner World War-II veterans and their lawful widows who are permanent residents of Madhya Pradesh.

faqs.question: What is the amount of assistance provided?
Who verifies the applications?
faqs.answer: The application verifies by the District Sainik Welfare Office.

faqs.question: What is the mode of disbursement?
faqs.answer: Direct bank transfer to the beneficiary’s account.

faqs.question: Is there an income limit?
faqs.answer: No specific income limit mention in the guidelines.

faqs.question: Can heirs other than the widow claim benefits?
faqs.answer: No, after the widow’s death, no heir is eligible.

faqs.question: What is the processing time for approval?
faqs.answer: The processing time within one week of application verification.

faqs.question: Is there any application fee?
faqs.answer: No, the process is free of cost.

faqs.question: Where can one get more information?
faqs.answer: From the District Sainik Welfare Office or the Directorate of Sainik Welfare, Bhopal.
